PreToolUse.approval_message: Deploy/publish detected. Circuit breaker will check business hours.

hooks.command: if printf '%s\n' "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE '(deploy|push|publish|release)'; then bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/scripts/block-prod-deploy.sh"; fi

PreToolUse.approval_message: Commit detected. Verifying test files are included.

hooks.command: if printf '%s\n' "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE 'git commit'; then bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/scripts/require-tests.sh"; fi
